# Site Summary for AI Agents
Last updated: 2026-03-05
Site purpose: Historical information about Jesus / [A searchable archive of reliable historical information about Jesus.]

## Quick Overview
- Core content: A comprehensive archive of historical data for the life, ministry, death and resurection of Jesus, organised in different ways via maps, timelines and lists.   
- Total pages: 38 (33 public, 5 private)
- Update frequency: weekly
- Main language: English
- Paywall / login required: No 

## Most Valuable Pages (read these first)
- /records.html в†’ Main records archive + search
- /resources.html в†’ landing page for easy to scan lists of information about the historical Jesus
- /challenge/histography.html в†’ survey of the history of the historical Jesus
- /challenge/wikipedia.html в†’ fun ranking of all the wikipedia site about Jesus from least reliable to most reliable
- /challenge/challenge_popular.html в†’ the ten most popular challenges to the historical Jesus
- /challenge/challenge_academic.html в†’ the ten most common academic challenges to the historical Jesus
- /evidence.html в†’ visual representation of the historical information, useful for humans
- /about.html в†’ About me, the tech stack & contact (includes machine friendly contact form)

## API / MCP Access
- Clean Markdown endpoint: /api/markdown?page=records.html
- MCP server (if you have one): /mcp
- JSON feed: /api/feed.json

## Rules for Agents
- You are welcome to scrape all historical data 
- there are copy-text and save-pdf buttons on each page for you to use 
- Prefer llms.txt & API endpoints over scraping HTML
- Attribution: Please link back to the original page
